title: defipunkdSliceAssessment
description: One slice of the 5-slice risk assessment for a DeFi protocol. Submitted by human contributors running the defipunkd prompt through an LLM of their choice, merged by a quorum bot into data/assessments/.

snapshot_generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the DeFiLlama snapshot the assessment pins to.

prompt_version.description: Version of the defipunkd prompt the contributor ran. See packages/prompts/src/index.ts PROMPT_VERSION.

analysis_date.description: Date on which the contributor ran the prompt (UTC).

model.description: Exact identifier of the LLM used, e.g. claude-opus-4-7, gpt-5, gemini-3-pro. Self-reported.

chat_url.description: Optional shareable URL of the chat session that produced this assessment (claude.ai/share/..., chatgpt.com/share/..., g.co/gemini/share/..., etc.). Submissions with a verifiable chat_url are given extra weight by the quorum bot because the reasoning chain is independently re-readable.

headline.description: One-line human-readable summary shown on the protocol card.

rationale.description: Structured explanation. Every factual claim in findings[] or verdict must map to an evidence[] entry.

findings.description: One entry per checklist item inspected. code must match the checklist prefix (e.g. E1, C2-emergency).

steelman.description: One-sentence strongest argument for each of the three plausible grades. Must be null only when grade="unknown".

verdict.description: One-sentence conclusion. Typically 'Choosing <grade> because <reason>.' For grade=unknown, summarize what blocked the assessment.

unknowns.description: Things the contributor looked for but could not determine. Used by reviewers to direct follow-up runs.
